chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah. Cr. Bail Appl.No.2065 of 2025 Rab Nawaz.........Vs.......... The State. 17.11.2025. Mr. Shah Imroz Khan, Advocates for applicant Mr. Musharaf Azhar, Special Prosecutor ANF. O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant was arrested from Jinnah International Airport, Karachi on 23.04.2025 when he was about to board in a flight bound for Saudi Arabia to perform Umrah. From Ahram, he was wearing, 1.150 K.G Methamphetamine (ice) was recovered, which offence is punishable minimum for 10 years. Accordingly, he was booked in Cr. No.24/2025 U/s 6,9 (vi) CNS Act, 1997. 2. Case of the applicant for bail is that in chemical report, it is not specifically stated that ice was recovered from Ahram. He has relied upon PLJ 2025 Cr. C. 20. His arguments have been opposed by learned Special Prosecutor ANF. 3. We have heard the parties and perused record. The point taken by learned defence counsel cannot be appreciated at bail stage as it requires deeper appreciation of evidence. Chemical report prima facie shows that ice was recovered from the Ahram worn by the applicant. Applicant is prima facie involved in a heinous offence. 4. In view of above, we do not find the applicant entitled to the concession of bail. His bail application is dismissed. The trial court is however, directed to expedite the trial and conclude it as soon as possible. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.K
